_meta._capture_origin: Claude Code SessionEnd hook contract from public docs; concrete session_id/cwd/transcript_path values aligned to the local SecondSight session at ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-yuyu-liao-vicone-SecondSight/3756b281-8769-424f-bb1a-aa3fe1aeecc9.jsonl (observed 2026-05-12). No raw SessionEnd stdin capture was available locally, so reason remains documentation-shaped.
_meta._privacy_canary_field_rationale: Claude Code session hooks expose permission_mode, but SecondSight does not currently persist it into Event.data. The canary sits on that non-persisted field so the fixture can keep a realistic session_id while still tripping if raw permission state starts leaking into data.
